gamerule.ace.speed_player.description: Max Speed, in blocks per second, for rideable carts with a player passenger. 0 = default
gamerule.ace.speed_other.description: Max Speed, in blocks per second, for rideable carts with a mob passenger. 0 = default
gamerule.ace.speed_empty.description: Max Speed, in blocks per second, for rideable carts without a passenger. 0 = default
